creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
The imap-uw port is out of date (does someone maintain it ?) -- fact is
that the source tarball changes constantly (daily ?).
  The problem is that the port's patches won't apply cleanly anymore and
the MD5 checksum is no more useful (the tarball changes too quickly) -- 
setting it to "IGNORE" might be a better approach.

  BTW, if noone else is taking care of the port I'll make myself available
to maintain it -- though I'm not so sure if I'm prepaired for this... Just
notice me.

Fix: Attached to this message are two files:
   * imap-uw-4.1b.tar.gz  -- archive with new files:
	Makefile (added an IGNOREFILES statement)
	files/md5 (set md5 checksum to IGNORE)
	patches/patch-aa
	patches/patch-ab
	patches/patch-ac

   * imap-uw-4.1b.diff.gz -- patchfile to apply on the current imap-uw 
     port tree to produce the same files listed above

--8<--

--8<--
How-To-Repeat: 
  Try to compile imap-uw port...
